description: Contractor projects list page shows assignments grouped by status
steps: Verify route 'contractor/projects' is registered in routes.ts
Verify contractor.projects._index.tsx renders assignments grouped by in_progress, upcoming, completed
Verify each assignment shows building name, trade, category, progress bar, and status badge

description: Contractor project detail page shows building and assignment info
steps: Verify route 'contractor/projects/:id' is registered in routes.ts
Verify contractor.projects.$id.tsx displays building title, address, status badge
Verify the page shows contractor's assignment details (trade, status, progress)
Verify the page shows construction updates timeline if available
